chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Transfer Appln.No.S-82 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of MA-8867/19 20.12.2019. Mr. Ayaz Ali Ghuryani, advocate for applicant. Ms. Rameshan Oad, A.P.G for State. = The applicant by way of instant application u/s 526 Cr.P.C has sought for transfer of this case from the Court of learned Additional Sessions Judge, Sehwan to any other Court of competent jurisdiction at Hyderabad mainly for the reason that he and his witnesses are threatened by the accused of dire-consequences, if they would attend the learned trial Court at Sehwan. When, where and at what time, such threats were issued to the applicant and his witnesses? It is not made known by the applicant. No criminal case could be ordered to be transferred from one to other Court on the basis of self-procured ground. Consequently, the instant application is dismissed along with listed application. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
